=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/serviceNotAsClass_preview.ts(5,24): warning TS377056: `ServiceMap.Service` is assigned to a variable here, but this API is intended for a class declaration shape such as `class Preview extends ServiceMap.Service<Preview, { port: number }>()("Preview") {}`. effect(serviceNotAsClass)


==== /.src/serviceNotAsClass_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics serviceNotAsClass:warning
    import { ServiceMap } from "effect"
    
    export const Preview = ServiceMap.Service<{ port: number }>("Preview")
                           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377056: `ServiceMap.Service` is assigned to a variable here, but this API is intended for a class declaration shape such as `class Preview extends ServiceMap.Service<Preview, { port: number }>()("Preview") {}`. effect(serviceNotAsClass)
